public_reputation: Known around Soreheim Proper through day-to-day work as porter.
manner: Judges the world by weight, delay, and whether moving one thing will jam five others behind it. In Soreheim Proper, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of porter in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of porter while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of porter credible while absorbing the strain created by quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.

adventure_hooks.summary: Bastian Hearthwrit can draw the party into a locality problem centered on porter duties in Soreheim Proper.
Bastian Hearthwrit becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure around Soreheim Proper.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Bastian Hearthwrit is immediately readable as a porter tied to Soreheim Proper.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Bastian Hearthwrit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a porter and the daily pressures of Soreheim Proper.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a porter, and proof that strangers will not make Soreheim Proper harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Bastian Hearthwrit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a porter too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can move people or goods quickly and knows which cargo draws the wrong attention.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Bastian Hearthwrit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Bastian Hearthwrit always knows more about Soreheim Proper than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a porter in Soreheim Proper.
